title: scutellaria stewartii
intro: Scutellaria stewartii, also known as Stewart's skullcap or Western skullcap, is a perennial plant native to Western Canada and the United States. It belongs to the mint family and is characterized by its blue or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria stewartii are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule for various health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting relaxation.
